what_it_does: This file is a metadata stub that records a channel attachment, mapping an attachment identifier to a target board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
target is a board:// URI pointing to item-52e3fc72
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
standouts: target uses a board:// URI scheme
attachment_type is board_items, implying a link to a board/kanban item
notes: A timestamped channel-memory attachment record that points a board item target in the dragnet-development channel.
purpose_vs_actual: The metadata states it is a board_items attachment targeting a board item, and the file contains exactly that metadata with no contradictions.
intention_signals: It appears to persist the fact that a specific board item was attached to or referenced within the dragnet-development channel at a precise time.
contribution: Provides a durable, timestamped link between an attachment identifier and a board item target, supporting later lookup of which board items were attached in a channel.
